zh.lifeSummary: Robert II Pype是Robert Pype的兒子，於1230年出生在英國斯塔福爾派 利德瓦雷。他於1254年與Maud Thamenhorn在英國斯塔福爾派 利德瓦雷結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1293年在英國斯塔福爾沃爾維哈普頓享年63歲。

nameMeanings.name: Pype
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish, Irish and English: variant of   Piper  . This form of the surname is found mainly in Scotland and Ireland.
Dutch: variant, archaic or Americanized, of Pijper, itself a variant of Piper .

variants.name: Piper
meanings: English (mainly southern): occupational name for a player on the pipes, Middle English pipere, sometimes a paid town musician.
English: sometimes a variant of   Peppard  .
English: perhaps occasionally an occupational name from late Middle English piper ‘repairer or layer of pipes; plumber’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: Robert II Pype was born in 1230, in Pipe Ridware, Staffordshire, England as the son of Robert Pype. He married Maud Thamenhorn in 1254, in Pipe Ridware, Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1293, in Wolverhampton, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 63.

Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1293, à Wolverhampton, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert II Pypeは1230年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアピペ リドワーでRobert Pypeの息子として生まれた。1254年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアピペ リドワーでMaud Thamenhornと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1293年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアウオルバーハンプトンで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert II Pype(은)는 1230년 영국 스태퍼드실르 파이프 리드워에서 Robert Pype의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1254년 영국 스태퍼드실르 파이프 리드워에서 Maud Thamenhorn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1293년 영국 스태퍼드실르 울버함프턴에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Robert II Pype родился в 1230 г. в местности паип ридвар, стаффордшир, Англия. Его отца звали Robert Pype. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud Thamenhorn в 1254 г. в местности паип ридвар, стаффордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1293 г. в местности волвирамптон, стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 63 лет.
